3198500.name: Fantasy Grounds - Seven Worlds Setting Guide (SWADE)
3198500.description:
Seven Worlds Setting Guide (SWADE)

An Epic, Realistic Science-Fiction Setting for Savage Worlds!  Now re-optimized to leverage the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
ENNIE NOMINEE FOR BEST ADVENTURE OF 2018 In the year 2217 Humanity's greatest achievement is the colonization of the nearby star systems now known as the Seven Worlds. Here Humanity lives, thrives, and prepares the next great wave of space exploration.
The Seven Worlds. This is the story of how we lost them, and of the heroes who tried to avert their fall.
  • Take the role of heroes in an epic campaign reminiscent of the classic arcs of the greatest space opera TV shows and novels!
  • Edge-of-your-seat realistic space battles combining the latest insights of science and weaponry with the easy and quick rules of Savage Worlds.
  • Create heroes worthy of the challenge, with dozens of new Edges, Hindrances, and Powers, as well as new types of gear, software, and weaponry!
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Alan Gober
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
